nl_query: Show the complete faculty eligibility and performance chain: faculty name, department, courses they are mapped to, boards they are in the pool for, scripts assigned, scripts submitted, and their average evaluation speed.
failed_sql: SELECT fc.name AS evaluator_name, au.display_name AS user_display_name, d.name AS department_name, b.id AS board_id, sa.script_id AS script_id, sa.submitted_at AS submitted_at, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (sa.submitted_at - sa.assigned_at)) / 3600) AS avg_evaluation_speed FROM faculty_course_mapping fcm JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = fcm.faculty_cache_id JOIN academic_unit au ON au.id = fc.department_id JOIN board b ON b.course_id = fcm.course_id JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.faculty_cache_id = fc.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE WHERE fcm.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY fc.name, au.display_name, d.name, b.id, sa.script_id, sa.submitted_at ORDER BY fc.name, b.id, sa.submitted_at
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'name'. It exists in multiple tables (faculty_cache, academic_unit). You must qualify it with a table alias.
